summary: Solid test suite with comprehensive requirements coverage. test_aggregator.py thoroughly exercises parsing (JUnit XML, JSON), aggregation, flaky detection, and markdown rendering with good use of helper fixtures. test_workflow.py validates workflow structure (triggers, jobs, pinned actions) and includes three act-driven integration tests covering all-pass, mixed matrix, and error-handling scenarios. Strengths: clear organization, good fixture patterns, strong integration testing via act, explicit assertions on exact output values. Gaps: JSON status-variant strings not explicitly tested despite code handling them; limited edge-case coverage (empty files, special characters in names, message escaping in markdown); no tests for missing JSON fields or permission errors; only 3 act cases (time-constrained). Missing test for rendering large failed-test sections. Would catch most regressions; acts as good safety net for requirement fulfillment.
